title: Futurepack Additions
description: Let Futurepack Mod support more dimensions！
body:
Futurepack Additions is a datapack.This datapack adds dimension coordinate support of other mods to Futurepack Mod, so that Futurepak's spacecraft can go to the dimensions in these mods.

Currently, only the Beyond Earth mod is supported.

Please use JEI or REI to view the uses of the bedrock to see how the coordinates are made.

My English is not good. All contents of this article are translated into English by Baidu Translator.

Forge Version: https://modrinth.com/mod/futurepack-additions
